notes: Core mechanics exist but water death zone is broken (frog dies immediately when entering water rows even on logs due to y-range check overlap), target slots have misaligned hit detection, and no score-per-hop progression makes it feel incomplete.

Core movement, hazards, logs, scoring, and win slots exist, but the finish detection is imprecise and the overall presentation/play feel is a simplified, somewhat clunky Frogger rather than a polished faithful build.
